name: Tarragon Tempeh
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Tempeh, cut into half-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly grease a baking sheet with corn oil.
3. Saute the tempeh in corn oil for 3 minutes.
4. Blend the Brazil nuts in a blender until finely ground.
5. Mix the nut meal with chives, tarragon, salt, and one ounce of water.
6. Dip the tempeh in this batter and place on the baking sheet.
7. Place in the oven for 15 minutes.
